Title: Revised Foundation Design - Soil Conditions
Description: Geotechnical report identified expansive clay not accounted for in original design. Required deeper foundations and soil stabilization.

Title: Structural Steel Connection Redesign
Description: Original connection details did not meet current seismic requirements per updated IBC. Required moment frame connections at 14 locations.

Title: Underground Utility Conflict Resolution
Description: Existing 12-inch storm drain not shown on survey conflicted with new sanitary sewer routing. Required reroute and additional manholes.

Title: Added Fire Rated Shaft Walls
Description: Code review identified missing 2-hour fire rated shaft walls at 6 MEP penetration locations per NFPA 101. Not in original documents.

Title: Structural Steel - Added Bracing per RFI Response
Description: Structural engineer added diagonal bracing at 8 bay locations in response to RFI-042. Original design underestimated lateral loads.

Title: HVAC System Upsizing - Operating Room Suite
Description: Mechanical engineer acknowledged undersized AHU for OR suite. Required larger equipment and additional ductwork to meet ASHRAE 170.

Title: Revised Plumbing Risers - Coordination Conflict
Description: BIM coordination revealed plumbing risers conflicting with structural beams at 4 floor penetrations. Required rerouting and additional supports.

Title: Additional Concrete Testing - Failed Cylinder Breaks
Description: Multiple cylinder breaks below specified 4000 PSI required additional coring and testing per structural engineer directive.

Title: Electrical Service Upgrade
Description: Electrical load calculations show original 2000A service undersized. Utility requires upgraded transformer and switchgear. Awaiting final pricing.

Title: Fire Suppression Redesign - MRI Suite
Description: Original design specified wet sprinkler in MRI suite. Required pre-action system per NFPA 13 and manufacturer requirements.

Title: Revised Concrete Mix Design - Winter Operations
Description: Extended cold weather required heated enclosures and high-early strength concrete mix. Additional curing costs and accelerators.

Title: HVAC Controls Integration - Nurse Call System
Description: Original specifications did not include integration between BAS and nurse call system required by hospital operations. Additional control points and programming.

Title: Structural Steel - Embed Plate Revisions
Description: Embed plates for precast attachment revised after panel shop drawings rejected original locations. 22 plates affected.

Title: Plumbing - Medical Gas System Additions
Description: Facilities team identified 8 patient rooms missing medical gas outlets per updated departmental requirements. Added during construction.

Title: Interior Glass Partition Upgrade
Description: Owner requests frameless glass partitions at main lobby and administrative suite in lieu of specified drywall partitions.

Title: Waterproofing Remediation - Foundation Wall
Description: Water infiltration at north foundation wall requires additional waterproofing membrane and drainage mat installation.

Title: Electrical Panel Relocation - Coordination
Description: Three electrical panels conflict with architectural casework locations identified during Level 2 rough-in. Requires relocation and additional conduit runs.

Title: Added Seismic Bracing - Mechanical Equipment
Description: Seismic analysis identified 12 pieces of mechanical equipment requiring additional seismic restraint per IBC 2021.
